options.query: What GIF are you looking for?

tts.description: Join your voice channel and speak text aloud

quote.view_description: Show a random quote, or a specific one by its number
quote.add_description: Add a quote for a user
quote.remove_description: Remove a quote by its number

news.description: Manage private news channels members can opt into
news.add_description: Create a new news channel and role-selector
news.remove_description: Delete a news channel and its role-selector
news.description_description: Set the description shown on this news channel's selector
news.restrict_description: Limit who may join this news channel to a role
news.permit_description: Allow a member to post in this read-only news channel

options.name: Name of the news channel
options.read_only: Only let members read, not post
options.restrict_role: Role allowed to join (leave empty to remove the restriction)
options.permit_allow: Allow posting (default), or set to false to revoke it

poll.description: Schedule polls that repeat every few days
poll.add_description: Create a recurring poll in a channel
poll.remove_description: Delete a recurring poll by its id

options.duration_hours: Hours each poll stays open. Empty = until the next repeat (end of day)
options.multiselect: Allow voting for more than one answer
options.first_interval_on: Weekday (e.g. Wednesday) or date the first repeat lands on (still posts now too)
options.remind: DM members who haven't voted, one day before the poll closes

loading: ⏱️ Asking the clock how long we've been alive...
info.title: ⚡ {name}

tts.need_voice: ⚠️ You need to be in a voice channel first
tts.connect_failed: ⚠️ Could not connect to your voice channel
tts.play_failed: ⚠️ Something went wrong while playing TTS

quote.none_for_user: 😶 There are no quotes for {user} yet
quote.year_must_be_number: ⚠️ The year must be a number
quote.not_allowed: ⛔ Only the person who added this quote, or an admin, can remove it
quote.edit_not_allowed: ⛔ Only the person who added this quote, or an admin, can edit it

news.no_permission: ⛔ You don't have permission to join this channel!
news.role_missing: ⚠️ This channel's role no longer exists
news.not_found_generic: ❓ This news channel no longer exists
news.not_in_news_channel: ⚠️ Run this command inside a news channel
news.permitted: ✍️ **{user}** can now post in this channel
news.unpermitted: 🚫 **{user}** can no longer post in this channel

poll.modal_question_help: Use {{date}} to show the upcoming date and it moves forward each repeat
poll.modal_options_help: One answer per line, between 2 and 10
poll.modal_date_help: Only needed if your question uses {{date}}
poll.created: 🗳️ Recurring poll created in {channel}, every {days} day(s)
poll.created_scheduled: 🗳️ Poll posted in {channel}; next on {when}, then every {days} day(s)
poll.invalid_start: ⚠️ I couldn't read that start. Try a weekday like `Wednesday`, or `17.06.2026`
poll.invalid_options: ⚠️ Please provide between {minimum} and {maximum} answers (one per line)
poll.option_too_long: ⚠️ Each answer may be at most {maximum} characters
poll.invalid_date: ⚠️ I couldn't read that date. Try e.g. `14.06.2026` or `14.06.`
poll.date_required: ⚠️ Your question uses `{{date}}`, so please provide a start date
poll.none: 😶 There are no recurring polls yet
poll.reminder_disabled: 🔕 You won't get any poll reminders anymore.

errors.max_concurrency: 🚧 This command is already running on this server. Please wait for it to finish.
